name: myheartcounts-llmevaluations
description: Stanford Biodesign Digital Health MyHeart Counts open-source project

scripts.install: npm --prefix nudge-generation install && npm --prefix custom-survey-service install && npm --prefix nudge-evaluation/llm-as-judge install
scripts.lint: npm --prefix nudge-generation run lint && npm --prefix custom-survey-service run lint && npm --prefix nudge-evaluation/llm-as-judge run lint
scripts.lint:fix: npm --prefix nudge-generation run lint:fix && npm --prefix custom-survey-service run lint:fix && npm --prefix nudge-evaluation/llm-as-judge run lint:fix
scripts.lint:strict: npm --prefix nudge-generation run lint:strict && npm --prefix custom-survey-service run lint:strict && npm --prefix nudge-evaluation/llm-as-judge run lint:strict
scripts.build: npm --prefix nudge-generation run build && npm --prefix custom-survey-service run build
